title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — snapshot.storage.kubernetes.io/allow-volume-mode-change
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
snapshot.storage.kubernetes.io/allow-volume-mode-change: "true"
Used on: VolumeSnapshotContent
Value can either be
true
or
false
. This determines whether a user can modify
the mode of the source volume when a PersistentVolumeClaim is being created from
a VolumeSnapshot.
Refer to
Converting the volume mode of a Snapshot
and the
Kubernetes CSI Developer Documentation
for more information.
